parameters.content:
## SA_Knowledge_Base_Save Workflow

Webhook-triggered workflow for saving user knowledge to Neon Postgres.
Called from:
- Agent Settings page (text input, fire-and-forget)
- Backend /api/file/process (extracted file text, after PDF/DOCX/etc extraction)

### Accepts:
- user_id, agent_id, type='text', content, category

### Flow:
1. Receive webhook POST with text content
2. Prepare document for embedding
3. Generate embedding (OpenRouter text-embedding-3-small)
4. INSERT into user_vector_knowledge_base (Neon)
5. Return success response

### Table: user_vector_knowledge_base
Columns: user_id, document, category, embedding, source

### Note:
File extraction (PDF, DOCX, JSON, etc.) is handled by the backend
(/api/file/process) BEFORE calling this webhook. This workflow
only deals with text content → embedding → storage.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.user_vector_knowledge_base (user_id, document, category, embedding, source)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Process Content').item.json.user_id }}',
  '{{ $('Process Content').item.json.document.replace(/'/g, "''").replace(/\n/g, ' ') }}',
  '{{ $('Process Content').item.json.category }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.data[0].embedding) }}',
  '{{ $('Process Content').item.json.source }}'
)
RETURNING id;
